IDEAL AUTO-RESOLVE. Manually swapped in for ticket 8196 (see deviations). Dana's VPN-drop ticket: single, well-covered KB doc (vpn-connectivity-troubleshooting), standard troubleshooting steps available to every plan, no entitlement check required, no denial risk. If similarity/margin/gate signals ever clear on an honest run, this is the case that should. Current pipeline is expected to escalate it anyway (thresholds are near-unreachable per the council diagnostic) -- that gap is the measurement this case exists to expose, not a bug in the expectation.
